description_long: This is a large, armored military vehicle with a low, angular profile and a long, prominent cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The exterior is finished in a matte, dark green camouflage, with visible weathering and dirt along the lower panels and tracks. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, supporting heavy-duty continuous tracks designed for traversing rough terrain. The rear section includes grilles and storage racks, while the top is equipped with antennas, hatches, and various mounted equipment. The front is sloped for deflection, with headlights and towing hooks integrated into the armor. The overall construction is robust, with reinforced steel plating and functional details such as periscopes, exhausts, and access panels.
description: A large, armored military all-terrain vehicle with a long cannon, six road wheels per side, and a matte green, weathered exterior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the sloped armor, headlights, towing hooks, and the narrow profile of the cannon barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the six large road wheels, continuous tracks, and the full length of the cannon and turret.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the engine grilles, storage racks, and rear lights, with the turret and cannon facing away.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, wheels, and turret details, with visible antennas and mounted equipment.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tracks feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern designed for maximum traction on mud, gravel, and uneven surfaces.
